content.en:
The two eternal ancient pine leaves turned into streamers and entered Ye Tian's soul.

At this moment, Ye Tian felt the incomparable pleasure of his soul, and his comprehension and perception of the eternal rules seemed to have been raised to a very incredible realm all of a sudden.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took some other auxiliary treasures to help him impact the realm of the Double Supreme One.

Time passes slowly –

Although Ye Tian was about seventy or eighty percent sure of his breakthrough, he was not 100% sure after all, so he was very calm and did not let his mood fluctuate at all.

After a long time, Ye Tian's body began to change.

Countless source sea origins poured into Ye Tian's body, which was breaking the shackles and absorbing external energy to promote the transformation of his body.

To put it simply, Ye Tian successfully broke through to the realm of the Double Supreme.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took a little more time to stabilize the realm.

At this point, the time is almost up.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Source God Pavilion.

......

Yuanshen Pavilion, a trading space.

A Supreme One entered the place, and soon the Ninety-One Supreme was gathered.

At this moment, the Supreme Storm Source God, who had discovered the Eternal Tribulation Domain, spoke, "Since everything is here, let's go!"

Many supreme beings nodded, and immediately followed the Storm Source God to directly move to an area of the Source Sea with the help of the ability of the Source God Pavilion to move.

Many Supreme Beings followed the Storm Source God in the Source Sea, and it didn't take long for them to come to a space-time warp land.

There are many space-time warps in the Source Sea, which is a common area of the Source Sea.

These space-time warped lands often give birth to some unique Void Realms, but the space-time warped lands here are so small that they are almost impossible to notice if you don't get close to them.

Moreover, it should be born here for not very long years.

"This is it!

The Storm Source God whispered.

Whoa!!!

A Supreme One entered the area, and soon spied a black crack under the guidance of the Storm Source God.

This black crack is the entrance to the Eternal Tribulation.

"It's really the entrance to the Eternal Tribulation Domain!"

A Triple Supreme was instantly recognizable.

The other Triple Supreme nodded slightly: "It is indeed the Eternal Tribulation Domain, I once went to the entrance of a high-level Eternal Tribulation Domain, although I didn't dare to enter it, but the aura is the same." This Eternal Tribulation Realm is indeed only at a rudimentary level. "

"Let's go in together, once we enter, this entrance will be more unstable, and we can't enter other supreme beings for a short time, otherwise the entrance will disappear, and it will be a bit troublesome for us to leave at that time. "Storm Source Shinto.

The other Supreme Beings nodded, and immediately entered the Eternal Tribulation Domain one by one.

And Ye Tian also entered this Eternal Tribulation Domain with him, and the moment he entered, he immediately used a defensive supreme skill to prevent himself from being attacked.

However, he was not attacked.

Obviously, this entrance is unguarded by the Eternal Tribulation.

This is also very normal, after all, it has never been discovered, and the Eternal Tribulation Clan naturally does not pay much attention to it, and if it is really discovered, it will be very dangerous if it is guarded here.

Whoa!!!

As soon as a Supreme One entered the Eternal Tribulation Domain, he immediately dispersed, and his hidden aura and body dived into the past in all parts of the Eternal Tribulation Domain.

Ye Tian also hid his breath and slowly shuttled in a certain direction.

The goal of this entry is simple, which is to find some Eternal Tribulations, kill them, and obtain the Eternal Tribulation Crystals on their bodies.

Soon, Ye Tian saw an Eternal Tribulation Clan.

The other party was like an ancient star in the void, and was bumped into by Ye Tian.

The strength of this Eternal Tribulation Clan is not weak, and it is about comparable to a supreme person at the pinnacle.

Ye Tian discovered it, and it also happened Ye Tian.

"Cultivators from the outside world!"

The first moment this Eternal Tribulation saw Ye Tian, he fled, not killed Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian's current cultivation had reached the realm of the Double Supreme One, and he didn't think that he was an opponent, so he chose to run away.

However, it can't escape.

Wow!

Ye Tian crossed the void with one hand, and with just one blow, the body of this Eternal Tribulation Clan was shattered, and all the vitality was annihilated, leaving only some Blood, Origin Rule Crystals, Bones, and a one-person-tall Eternal Crystal.

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, put these things away, and then continued to look for other Eternal Tribulation Clans.

At the same time, the Eternal Tribulation of this Eternal Tribulation Realm knew that an outsider had broken in, and immediately gathered to resist the Supreme of the Outside World.

The Supreme One and the Eternal Tribulation fought in this Eternal Tribulation Domain, and the Eternal Tribulation fell one by one, but there were also Supreme Ones who fell into the trap of the Eternal Tribulation, were surrounded by heavy circumstances, and were finally besieged and killed.

And Ye Tian's strength was very strong, and he encountered several Eternal Tribulation Clans, and they were all easily killed.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered an Eternal Tribulation Clan at the level of the Double Supreme One, and with just one blow, he severely injured and dying the opponent, if it was the second blow, this Eternal Tribulation would definitely die.

But at this moment, a picture scroll appeared in the void, wanting to take Ye Tian in.

This scroll is not an ordinary scroll, but a source device.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the Endless Eternal Body with all his strength, performed a variety of power-type Supreme Ancestral Techniques, and then superimposed the Shattered Void.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian punched out, shattering pieces of territory, and even the picture scroll was shattered.

This blow has surpassed the Triple Supreme, almost comparable to the full force of the Fivefold Supreme.

In the picture scroll, the three Eternal Tribulation Clans were directly killed.

"It's not good, the strength of this supreme is too strong, let's go together!"

An Eternal Tribulation appeared, about a dozen.

Ye Tian knew that the Eternal Tribulation Clan was bait, but he was not afraid at all.

With his strength, he is almost invincible in this low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain, even if he encounters a large number of Eternal Tribulation Clans, even if he may not be able to fight, but no one can stop him if he wants to leave.

"Kill!"

A big war unfolded.

Ye Tian is too perfect in all aspects, whether it is speed, strength, or defense, he is far from these Eternal Tribulation Clans, although these Eternal Tribulation Clans are also comparable to the geniuses of the Children of the Void, but the gap is too big compared to Ye Tian.

In a short time, some of the Eternal Tribulation Clans died at Ye Tian's hands.

And Ye Tian didn't want to continue fighting, after all, he didn't know how many Eternal Tribulation Clans there were in this Eternal Tribulation Domain, the fall of this replica body was a trivial matter, but if these Eternal Tribulation Crystals in his hand were lost, the loss would be too great.

So, Ye Tian rushed out of the encirclement and quickly disappeared.
